name: newTab+
description: A beautiful glassmorphism new tab with quick links, weather, and a customizable tile grid
content_security_policy: script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src * data: blob:; connect-src https://api.open-meteo.com https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org; object-src 'none'
